text: Added FactorizationCapability, ExactSolveFactor, and LeastSquaresFactor. LU and Cholesky implement exact vector/matrix solve; QR implements least-squares vector/matrix solve. Added LU multi-RHS with pivoted gather and strided RHS support. Concrete determinant, Q, permutation, covariance, and residualization APIs remain unerased. Compile-time negative tests enforce capability separation; provider-produced factors and typed failures are covered. Verification: all 117 gale.linalg tests pass on JVM and Scala.js.
